title: Ruiru, Kiambu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ruiru, Kiambu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ruiru is a city in Kiambu with a population of 300,000. A fast-growing satellite town northeast of Nairobi, part of the greater Nairobi metropolitan area.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
